name: pr-review-automation-integration
description: TRIGGER CONDITIONS: Running implement_issues.py --review in a live environment. Use when: (1) launching PR review automation from a terminal or CI, (2) debugging CLAUDECODE nested session errors (unset env var or strip it in subprocess env), (3) choosing a good test PR (unit-tests-only failures are cleanest), (4) understanding expected phase timings (~12.5 min total for single PR).
